title: Natural Solutions for Dry Nose: 8 Herbal Essential Oils
description: Salvia officinalis essential oil is derived from the leaves of the sage plant. It has natural decongestant properties that can help relieve congestion in the nose. When inhaled, the oil's active compounds can break down mucus and open up airways, allowing for easier breathing. This can be especially helpful for people with dry noses, as the oil's expectorant properties can help loosen and clear out any remaining mucus.
